name: explain_rest_api
query: Explain what a REST API is in simple terms

criteria.name: clear_explanation
criteria.instruction: Response must provide a clear, jargon-free explanation of what a REST API is

criteria.name: uses_examples
criteria.instruction: Response must include an analogy or real-world example

criteria.name: mentions_http
criteria.instruction: Response must mention HTTP methods (GET, POST, etc.)

name: version_control_benefits
query: What are the benefits of using version control?

criteria.name: lists_benefits
criteria.instruction: Response must list at least 3 distinct benefits

criteria.name: mentions_collaboration
criteria.instruction: Response must mention how version control helps team collaboration

criteria.name: mentions_history
criteria.instruction: Response must mention the ability to track and revert changes

name: python_error_handling
query: How do I handle errors in Python?

criteria.name: code_example
criteria.instruction: Response must include a code example

criteria.name: best_practices
criteria.instruction: Response must mention when to use exceptions vs other error handling patterns
